message:
fix: session JSON output, config watch path comparison, dashboard cfg

Small fixes for edge cases discovered during testing.

session.go:
- Add JSON error output when attaching to non-existent session
- Ensures machine-readable output in JSON mode instead of plain text

watch.go:
- Convert config path to absolute before comparison
- Use filepath.Clean() on both paths for consistent comparison
- Fixes issue where relative vs absolute path differences could cause
  config changes to be missed

dashboard.go:
- Add cfg field to Model to store current config reference
- Update cfg on ConfigReloadMsg for future config-dependent features

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
